2606.17905.title: ChLogic: Evaluating Robustness of Logical Reasoning in Chinese Expressions
2606.17905.paper_summary: Large language models perform increasingly well on standardized logical reasoning benchmarks, but whether this ability remains robust beyond English is unclear. We introduce ChLogic, an English--Chinese aligned benchmark that tests whether models preserve logical reasoning performance when the same latent logical structure is expressed in English and diverse Chinese surface realizations. Built from formal logical templates, the benchmark contains three data sets: (i) the General aligned set, derived from 60 General Propositions across nine template families; (ii) the Difficult aligned set, derived from 40 Difficult Problems; and (iii) the Chinese-only set, covering 15 language-specific phenomenon types. Each aligned item pairs one English reference expression with five Chinese realizations. Experiments on Qwen3, Ministral, and GLM models reveal a persistent English--Chinese performance gap. Back-translation from standard Chinese into English often improves performance on the General aligned set, but produces mixed effects on the Difficult aligned set, where Qwen3-32B and GLM-5.1 perform worse after translation. These results indicate that Chinese surface realization, translation artifacts, and model-specific behavior jointly affect multilingual logical reasoning. Overall, ChLogic provides a useful stress test for the robustness of multilingual reasoning.
2606.17905.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在標準化邏輯推理基準測試中的表現越來越好，但這種能力在英語之外是否仍然穩健尚不清楚。<lb/>我們介紹了ChLogic，一個英中對齊的基準，測試模型在相同潛在邏輯結構以英語和多樣的中文表達時是否能保持邏輯推理的表現。<lb/>該基準由正式邏輯模板構建，包含三個數據集： (i) 一般對齊集，源自九個模板系列中的60個一般命題；<lb/>(ii) 難度對齊集，源自40個難題；<lb/>(iii) 僅中文集，涵蓋15種語言特定現象類型。<lb/>每個對齊項目將一個英語參考表達與五個中文實現配對。<lb/>在Qwen3、Ministral和GLM模型上的實驗顯示出持續存在的英中表現差距。<lb/>從標準中文回譯到英語通常會提高一般對齊集的表現，但對難度對齊集的影響則不一，Qwen3-32B和GLM-5.1在翻譯後表現更差。<lb/>這些結果表明，中文表面實現、翻譯工件和模型特定行為共同影響多語言邏輯推理。<lb/>總體而言，ChLogic為多語言推理的穩健性提供了一個有用的壓力測試。
2606.17905.author: Peixian Zhou et.al.
2606.17905.authors: Peixian Zhou, Yuxu Chen, Chaorui Zhang, Wei Han, Bo Bai, Xueyan Niu
